title: Duffie
compiled_truth: Duffie is an external contact at [Stanford](companies/stanford). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-08), Duffie sent 9 and received 22 emails, totalling 31 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince J Kaminski](people/vince-j-kaminski) (6), [J Kaminski](people/j-kaminski) (3), [David Port](people/david-port) (2), [Vkaminski](people/vkaminski-aol) (1), [Naveen Andrews](people/naveen-andrews) (1).
